tasks.title: Set up project infrastructure
tasks.description: Configure Vite, TypeScript, RTK Query, and other tooling

tasks.title: Implement task list page
tasks.description: Display tasks as cards with filtering and sorting

tasks.title: Write unit tests
tasks.description: Cover critical components and hooks with React Testing Library

tasks.title: Set up RTK Query API with json-server
tasks.description: Create baseApi, inject task and tag endpoints, configure the Redux store and typed hooks

tasks.title: Add filters, search and sorting to task list
tasks.description: Implement status, priority and tag filters, 200ms debounced title search, and asc/desc sort by created date or deadline. Persist all state in URL query params.

tasks.title: Quick-change task status via card dropdown
tasks.description: Replace static status badge with an inline Select that calls PATCH /tasks/:id on change. Dim the control while the request is in flight.

tasks.title: Task detail page with delete confirmation
tasks.description: Add /tasks/:id route that shows all task fields. Delete button opens an AlertDialog; on confirm the task is removed and the user is redirected to the list.

tasks.title: Task create/edit form with validation
tasks.description: Single modal form for both create and edit modes. Fields: title (min 5 chars), description (max 500), status dropdown, priority radio group, deadline date picker, tags autocomplete. Validated with zod + react-hook-form.

tasks.title: Tags autocomplete with inline tag creation
tasks.description: Multi-select input that filters existing tags by substring, shows a 'Create X' option when there is no exact match, and renders selected tags as dismissible chips. Dropdown rendered in a Portal to prevent modal layout shift.

tasks.title: Tag creation form with duplicate validation
tasks.description: Modal with a single name field. Zod schema is rebuilt on each render using useMemo over the current tag list so the refine check always sees fresh data.

tasks.title: Filter by tag via card click
tasks.description: Clicking a tag chip on a task card sets the tag filter in the URL, same as choosing the tag from the filter bar dropdown.

tasks.title: Pagination — 9 items per page
tasks.description: Add _page/_limit params to the task query. Read X-Total-Count from json-server response headers. Render a compact Pagination component with ellipsis support below the grid.

tasks.title: Write Storybook stories for core UI components
tasks.description: Add stories for TaskCard (all statuses, overdue state), TaskFilters, Pagination, TagFormModal and TaskFormModal. Configure ChakraProvider and Redux Provider as global decorators.

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests
tasks.description: Test useDebounce hook, useTaskFilterParams URL sync, TaskCard rendering and status dropdown, and the TagsAutocomplete create flow. Use React Testing Library with MSW for API mocking.

tasks.title: Add README with setup guide and architecture overview
tasks.description: Cover project description, prerequisites, dev/server/test/storybook scripts, feature list, and a brief architecture section explaining the FSD-inspired folder structure and data flow.
